cleaned_setup_notes: Runs a sitewide overlay popup on a 5s delay, no exit intent, template #4.

insight.recommendation: Your sitewide 5s overlay converts at 2.4%, below your ecommerce segment's 2.7% median. The segment leader converts at 4.1% with an exit-intent popup on the cart page and a 15% discount, versus your timed popup with 10% off. Add OptinMonster's exit-intent trigger to your overlay so it fires when shoppers move to leave instead of on a fixed delay.

insight.recommendation: Your static sidebar ebook widget converts at 1.1%, just above the software segment's 1.0% median. The segment leader reaches 2.1% with a timed slide-in (7s) offering a free 14-day trial and a single email field. Replace your trigger-less sidebar widget with OptinMonster's timed slide-in so the ebook offer actively appears while readers are engaged.

The segment leader hits 8.7% with an exit-intent popup shown only to returning visitors. Add OptinMonster's exit-intent trigger with returning-visitor targeting on top of your weekly digest offer.

cleaned_setup_notes: Standard welcome mat covering the whole page instantly on load.
Free 15-minute consultation offer.
High bounce rate reported in GA4.

insight.recommendation: Your instant welcome mat converts at 0.8%, the best in your professional-services segment (median 0.6% — only two clean sites, so treat this benchmark as low-confidence). There is no one to imitate: keep the mat and its free 15-minute consultation, and A/B test one variation — a short delay before it covers the page, since your notes report a high bounce rate in GA4.
